query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, ROUND(AVG(fileSize)/1024/1024, 2) as avg_mb, ROUND(MAX(fileSize)/1024/1024, 2) as max_mb, ROUND(SUM(fileSize)/1024/1024, 2) as total_mb, SUM(CASE WHEN thumbnailUrl IS NOT NULL AND thumbnailUrl != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_thumbnail FROM resources;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user KKo9odT1HVTXECY.26f2cde391d3 --database jX4Ppf2KXZ8z9Tppipem7T --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total, ROUND(AVG(fileSize)/1024/1024, 2) as avg_mb, ROUND(MAX(fileSize)/1024/1024, 2) as max_mb, ROUND(SUM(fileSize)/1024/1024, 2) as total_mb, SUM(CASE WHEN thumbnailUrl IS NOT NULL AND thumbnailUrl != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_thumbnail FROM resources;
